title: Data Engineer
description:
Publié le 11/02/2026
CDI / Casablanca

SII Group Morocco, a subsidiary of SII Group, is a Technology Consulting and Digital Services company created in 2008. We support major clients in adopting new technologies and driving innovation.

Our Talents First   
We offer an inclusive, flexible (remote‑friendly), and fulfilling work environment across Casablanca, Oujda, and Rabat — where ideas and ambitions truly matter.

The Data Engineer designs, builds, and optimizes scalable data pipelines and platforms to support analytics, reporting, and machine learning workloads.

Key Responsibilities:

Develop and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines across diverse data sources.
Model and optimize relational and big‑data storage systems.
Build APIs and data services for internal consumers.
Deploy and manage cloud‑based data platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP).

Tools & Technologies:

SQL, relational DBs
Spark, Hadoop, distributed compute
AWS / Azure / GCP (S3, BigQuery, Redshift…)
Python, APIs, microservices
High‑performance computing frameworks

Core Skills:

Data modeling, data integration
Performance tuning & optimization
Analytical thinking & clear communication
Autonomy, problem-solving, cross‑team collaboration
